title: Japanese-Style Ramen with Corn
description: A twist on the classic Japanese noodle soup, featuring sweet corn and a rich pork broth.

ingredients.name: pork bones
ingredients.notes: you can also use beef or chicken bones

ingredients.name: corn
ingredients.notes: fresh or frozen, corn kernels work too

ingredients.name: mirin
ingredients.notes: Japanese cooking wine or substitute with sake

instructions: 2. Place pork bones on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes.
3. In a large pot, combine roasted bones, 4 cups of water, soy sauce, mirin, and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 4 hours.
5. Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions.
6. Remove pork bones from the broth and discard.
7. Add corn kernels to the broth and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Assemble the ramen by placing noodles in a bowl, ladling the hot broth over the top, and garnishing with green onions if desired.
